checks.name: sealCompleteness
checks.evidence: Seal is complete with process exit code 0, 251 events, and final event hash fa46a54ff1d7757f14e0ce091954f839b4378af4b4be8868707dd7dba8acba6f.

checks.name: eventHashChain
checks.evidence: Sequences 0 through 250 are contiguous; every previousHash link and SHA-256 over canonical key-sorted JSON excluding the hash field verified. Captured timestamps are monotonic.

checks.name: chronologyAndToolPairs
checks.evidence: All 40 tool_execution_start events have exactly one later tool_execution_end with the same call ID and tool name. Three tool ends were explicitly marked errors and remain unaltered in the raw trace.

checks.name: canonicalDelegatedTask
checks.evidence: The first user message equals the English metadata canonicalTask after the harness delegation header; sourceUserMessageIncluded is false.

checks.name: promptToolModelGitProvenance
checks.evidence: Workflow bdd-java, agent spec-driven, then-effective prompt bdd-java-spec-driven-v4, agent definition SHA-256 f7265db508f2dfa459e80005f045252e80ef8047a8614fb6802597ec375ca1d0, tool registry fingerprint 58f9fb4ff63c4ac748fcf030b843b8687a38b4aab2362dd8974d2b5b32f7776b, model openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol, and initial Git state are non-null and consistent.

checks.name: javaspecProvenance
checks.evidence: Launcher 1.0.0-RC1 selected JAR SHA-256 8522dc72ab0ca87a508436419c4ed430e0ad470375445c689fa871218a8ab501; javaspec repository HEAD cd7ff8d1379aabdfcfadc964b3a6473f38383c66 contains required ancestors 5b65099 and 5662797.

checks.name: workflowPolicyStopClaim
checks.evidence: The selected pre-generation dry-run exited 1 and reported the absent constructor/component update. Safe generation then appended java.time.Instant occurredAt and the selected assertion passed 1/1 immediately. javap showed the ordered six-argument constructor and exactly one typed Instant accessor. Under effective v4, which required the delegated post-generation assertion RED, the agent stopped rather than manufacture a defect.

checks.name: restorationAndFinalGit
checks.evidence: The specification example and generated production component were reverted. Initial and final HEAD e5232940528522ae86d204840a2861d732795366 and tree 5ab887b26c4ed7cda82594e5c484373e77f7df3e match; porcelain-v2 status is empty, restored JavaSpec is 34/34, Maven tests pass, and pending production stub count is zero.

checks.name: subsequentGenericContractRevision
checks.evidence: Source-pack commit e57021fde02a4f4cf4b764d6c5c8a8793ecfacf3 (fix: accept structural red before safe generation) introduced bdd-java-spec-driven-v5. The installed and source spec-driven definitions are byte-identical with SHA-256 4fea1a3bbd6649ddac7d319e47444cb25859c538dfea33b42cc679cd14178468 and explicitly accept pre-generation structural RED while prohibiting manufactured defects. This later revision does not retroactively make the v4 stop a successful episode.

checks.name: privacyAndSanitization
checks.evidence: No private-key, AWS access-key, GitHub-token, bearer-token, or password-assignment pattern was found. The raw trace contains machine-local home paths and was not copied into dataset artifacts or a training messages view; repository artifacts contain only relative project paths, hashes, and sanitized evidence.
